---
title: "Descriptive Statistics Presentation"
format: html
---
## Libraries
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(table1)
library(cmprsk)
```

## Loading in Data

```{r}
heart <- read_csv("data/clean_heart_data_long.csv")
```


## Making table 1

### Adding labeled factor versions of certain variables (for table making)
```{r}
# DIAB statuses/types
heart$DIAB <- ifelse(is.na(heart$DIAB), 0, heart$DIAB) # making NA become 0s
heart$DIAB2 <- factor(heart$DIAB, levels = c(0, 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 998),
                      labels = c("Not Reported", "No", "Type I", "Type II", "Type Other", "Type Unknown", "Status Unknown"), 
                      ordered=TRUE)

# Gender
heart$GENDER2 <- factor(heart$GENDER, levels = c("F", "M"),
                        labels = c("Female", "Male"),
                        ordered = TRUE)

# ETHCAT
heart$ETHCAT2 <- factor(heart$ETHCAT, levels = c(1, 2, 4, 5, 6, 7, 9, 998),
                        labels = c("White", "Black", "Hispanic", "Asian", "AI/AN", "Hawaiian/Pacific-Islander", "Multiracial", "Unknown"))

# EXCEPTION
heart$EXCEPTION2 <- factor(heart$EXCEPTION, levels = c(0, 1),
                           labels = c("No Exception", "Exception"))

# ESCALATED
heart$ESCALATED2 <- factor(heart$ESCALATED, levels = c(0, 1),
                           labels = c("Stable", "Esclatated"))
```

```{r}

library(table1)

label(heart$INIT_AGE) <- "Age at Listing"
label(heart$INIT_BMI_NEW) <- "BMI at Listing"
label(heart$GENDER2) <- "Gender"
label(heart$ETHCAT2) <- "Race/Ethnicity"
label(heart$BTYPE_REC) <- "Blood Type"
label(heart$EXCEPTION2) <- "Exception Status"
label(heart$DIAB2) <- "Diabetes"
label(heart$ESCALATED2) <- "Escalated Status"

# The Actual Table for Descriptive Statistics
table1(
  ~ INIT_AGE +
    INIT_BMI_NEW +
    GENDER2 +
    ETHCAT2 +
    BTYPE_REC +
    EXCEPTION2 +
    DIAB2 |
    ESCALATED2,
  data = heart,
  caption = "Table 1. Descriptive Statistics by Escalation Status"

)
```

## Cumulative Incidence Plots
